platforms.name: EARMILK SubmitHub and Pillargram Music Submission Route
platforms.reason: Official submission route points to SubmitHub or Pillargram; third-party login, credits, feedback terms or paid options may apply.
platforms.business_email_context: Listed for brand partnership and event requests only; not a music submission address.

platforms.name: Obscure Sound SubmitHub and MusoSoup Indie/Electronic Submission Route
platforms.reason: Official page routes submissions through SubmitHub or MusoSoup; both can involve login, credits, campaign terms or paid options.
platforms.business_email_context: No direct public submission email used; official submission links only.

platforms.name: Variance Magazine Editorial Pitch and Premiere Submission Route
platforms.reason: Editorial/pitch/premiere contact route is public, but email links are JavaScript/spambot protected and must not be decoded or bypassed automatically.
platforms.business_email_context: Public contact categories observed; actual mailto values are protected and require manual resolution.

platforms.name: Radio Milwaukee Music Submission Route
platforms.reason: Free public submission guideline route, but audio package, WAV-preferred files, clean edits and release context require human review before submission.
platforms.business_email_context: Official public submission guideline page observed; no direct email extraction needed during repo update.

platforms.name: KCRW Airplay Consideration and Contact Route
platforms.reason: Public sources indicate airplay consideration is possible, but the current parsed KCRW contact page does not expose a simple auto-submit form or explicit address.
platforms.business_email_context: Manual contact resolution and program targeting required; no email guessing.
